notes: Initial hand-authored regions for coarse Greybound render comparison. These are analysis anchors, not musical ground truth.

segments.name: opening_preroll
segments.notes: Low-level preroll before the first real chord. Track startup here, but do not use it as an attack-quality anchor.

segments.name: opening_attack
segments.notes: First real chord transient after the quiet preroll.

segments.name: loud_dynamic_window
segments.notes: Coarse dynamic window to inspect compression and recovery behavior.

segments.name: high_band_window
segments.notes: Broadband guitar region used as a first high-band residual check.
